title: Files
noInlinePreview: No inline preview for this file type.
confirmBody: "{{name}}" will be removed everywhere — the file itself, its database records, and its search index. This cannot be undone.

storage.title: Storage
storage.note: Documents and other files count toward your storage; images don't.

empty.title: No files yet
empty.body: Files you upload in conversations or knowledge bases will appear here.
